roles.FacilitadorDesc: Controls the AI and simulation stages

pipeline.generatePrompt: Generate an AI scenario to see dynamic questions.

scenario.title: Client Information
scenario.hiddenObjectionNote: * The hidden objection is protected in the center panel (Client Info).
scenario.waiting: Waiting for the Facilitator to generate the AI scenario...

roles.title: Room Participants
roles.min_participants: At least 2 participants are needed to assign roles.
roles.checklistCopied: Checklist copied. Send it to the observers via chat.
roles.checklistContent:
=== EVALUATION CHECKLIST FOR OBSERVERS ===
Please pay attention to these 5 points during the Role-Play:

1. Rapport Level: Did the Closer build rapport before interrogating? Did they validate what the Lead said?
2. Real vs Superficial Pain: Did they stay on the symptom or dig into the real cause of frustration?
3. Value Gap: Did they make the Lead express their 'Opportunity Cost' or what they lose if they don't act today?
4. Recapitulation: Did the Closer organize the Lead's chaos and summarize their situation before presenting the solution?
5. Objection Isolation: When the initial excuse appeared, did the Closer try to convince with logic, or did they dig into the hidden objection?

debrief.title: Debriefing / Analysis
debrief.infoPlaceholder: E.g. The client confessed they lose $10k a month...
debrief.unexploredPlaceholder: E.g. The lack of budget was not explored deeply...

event.crossed_arms: The client crosses their arms: 'I just remembered my partner needs to be in this decision.'
event.competitor: The client casually mentions they are evaluating [Direct Competitor] as well.
event.budget_frozen: The client's initial budget was just frozen by the board of directors.
event.two_minutes: The client interrupts you: 'I only have 2 minutes left, just tell me how much it costs and what's included.'
event.ghost_objection: A ghost objection appears: 'Honestly, we had a bad experience with something similar years ago and I don't want to repeat it.'

privateInfo.title: Private Client Information
privateInfo.empty: No private information available for this scenario.

settings.title: Simulation Settings
settings.helpText: Data is saved locally in your browser. You can connect to any API supporting the OpenAI format. To use Ollama, ensure it is running on your PC.
settings.stagesHelp: Configure the stages of your sales process. The AI will use the 'Base Information' provided here to generate realistic objections and question patterns for your scenario.

product.placeholder: Write the product presentation the Closer must sell here...
